final_files.tests/test_final.py:
import stat
from io import BytesIO
from zipfile import ZipFile, ZipInfo

import pytest

from archive_extract import extract_archive
from archive_paths import normalized_member_path


def test_mixed_separator_escape_and_nested_link_are_both_confined(tmp_path):
    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
        normalized_member_path(r"safe\..\..\outside.txt")

    escape = BytesIO()
    with ZipFile(escape, "w") as archive:
        archive.writestr(r"safe\..\..\outside.txt", "no")
    escape.seek(0)
    with ZipFile(escape) as archive, pytest.raises(ValueError):
        extract_archive(archive, tmp_path / "workspace-a")
    assert not (tmp_path / "outside.txt").exists()

    linked = BytesIO()
    info = ZipInfo("safe/link")
    info.create_system = 3
    info.external_attr = (stat.S_IFLNK | 0o777) << 16
    with ZipFile(linked, "w") as archive:
        archive.writestr(info, "../../outside.txt")
    linked.seek(0)
    with ZipFile(linked) as archive, pytest.raises(ValueError):
        extract_archive(archive, tmp_path / "workspace-b")
    assert not (tmp_path / "workspace-b" / "safe" / "link").exists()
